steps.text: Everybody has feelings. Learning the words helps us talk about them. Who looks happy? Find the smiling face!
steps.feedback: A big smile! What makes you feel happy? Now find sad.
Sometimes we feel sad — that's okay, it's a normal feeling. Now find worried.
Worried means we're not sure if something will be okay. Now find angry.
Angry is a big feeling. Taking a deep breath can help. Last one — find surprised!
Surprised! Something unexpected happened. You know five important feelings!
